mapper.select: SELECT L.LOAN_ID as loanId, L.BOOK_ID as bookId, B.TITLE as title, L.USER_ID as userId, L.LOAN_DATE as loanDate, L.DUE_DATE as dueDate, L.STATUS as status FROM LOANS L JOIN BOOKS B ON L.BOOK_ID = B.BOOK_ID WHERE L.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY L.LOAN_ID DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE LOANS SET STATUS = 'RETURN', RETURN_DATE = CURDATE() WHERE LOAN_ID = #{loanId}
mapper.select: SELECT L.LOAN_ID as loanId, L.BOOK_ID as bookId, B.TITLE as title, L.USER_ID as userId, L.LOAN_DATE as loanDate, L.DUE_DATE as dueDate, L.RETURN_DATE as returnDate, L.STATUS as status FROM LOANS L JOIN BOOKS B ON L.BOOK_ID = B.BOOK_ID ORDER BY L.LOAN_ID DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE LOANS SET STATUS = 'OVERDUE' WHERE STATUS = 'LOAN' AND DUE_DATE < CURDATE()
